result.text:
For mid-rares, you have to also think that new collectors are going to be looking for their forever PFPs too and will value aesthetics. So if you can accept a lower level of instant liquidity and have a reasonable time horizon, the value of an aesthetic Ape is likely to increase more over time as NFTs come back to the spotlight... Especially as Otherside launches and people truly become their identity, they will value traits and aesthetics even that much more. Look at MMORPGs as a model, as popularity of them grew, the premium on aesthetics did too, exponentially.

If you enjoy collecting for your own personal display (not just as a PFP, but for example utilizing the IP for creation of IRL objects or in a digital frame), that would be another reason. If you are looking for the most liquid secondary buy, then sure, can understand floor.

legacy.full_text: @PeterParkerNFT For mid-rares, you have to also think that new collectors are going to be looking for their forever PFPs too and will value aesthetics. result.text:
🦍 Bored Ape Yacht Club (BAYC) NFTs on PulseChain 🚀  
These aren’t knockoffs—they’re the real BAYCs, forked onto PulseChain at launch, airdropped to original Yuga Labs holders. 😱 Same contract, same community, owned by Yuga Labs, who just broke a world record on Feb 22, 2025! 😎  

Only 20 of the 10,000 PulseChain BAYCs are listed on PulseMarket—super rare! 💎 Prices? An amazing value compared to Ethereum:  
- Cheapest: 18M $PLS (~$793 USD or ~0.2816 $ETH) 😯  
- Top: 1B $PLS (~$44,000 USD or ~15.6 $ETH) 🤯  
- Grab 19 of the 20 listed (excluding the one at 1B $PLS, including crowned #9723) for under 750M $PLS (~$33,000 USD or ~11.7 $ETH)—way cheaper than Ethereum’s 13.9 ETH (~$39,000 USD) for one ape! 🤑  

PulseChain’s faster, cheaper, and fee-free—perfect for these apes to soar. 🚀 Yuga could drop exclusive art or upgrades, making these PulseChain BAYCs the next big opportunity while Ethereum’s struggle. 🏆 Don’t miss out—this could be your shot at a massive win! 🔥  

Check the listings out on @PulseMarket_NFT, a native NFT marketplace on PulseChain.
